title: migration.run task payload (v1)
description: Input for the migration agent's migration.run skill — PRD part-5. Fields are deliberately 1:1 with the Make.com runtime vars so the makecom backend is a pure pass-through.

sourceLocation.description: Source to migrate — incl. content-gen synthetic source URLs

folder.description: Explicit target folder (verbatim, no batch prefix/postfix) — generated drafts land here, e.g. 'ai-articles'. When set it overrides the migration-batch-* default. Keep generated content OUT of curated reference paths like /ai-content.

neighborPageUrl.description: A reference page (best-practice exemplar) the migrator GETs to learn this site's block conventions and editorial look — e.g. the canonical article it should mimic.

pattern.description: Prompt variant. 'article' authors a journal article (Theme: paper + Template: article; hero + stats + quote + author-bio) mimicking neighborPageUrl; 'generic' is the structural-fidelity default.

backend.description: Which runtime executes the migration. The Agent Card hides this — same skill, same artifact. 'dryrun' simulates (scaffold/testing).
